definition:
1. the head, top, highest point;  hence, 
2. the crown  or top of the head , (Iliad by Homer), attic 
3. the top  or peak  of a mountain, (Iliad by Homer) 
4. metaphorically the highest point , Lat. summa, παντὸς ἔχει κορυφάν is the best of all , (Pindar); κορυφὰ λόγων προτέρων the sum and substance  of ancient legends, (Pindar) 
5. the height  or excellence of  a thing, i. e. the choicest, noblest, best , (Pindar) 
 (ML)
